__deployment_note: These series are pushed via OTLP (DELTA temporality) by agentsfleetd to a Fly-deployed OpenTelemetry Collector running the `deltatocumulative` processor, which converts to cumulative before Grafana Cloud Mimir. The panel exprs use the Prometheus-translated names (dots -> underscores; histogram gets _bucket/_sum/_count). Do NOT deploy these panels until the Collector is configured, or they read empty. None of these queries touch the control-plane Postgres.
title: Agent Observability — OTLP (Mimir)

panels.title: Credit Drained — nanos/sec by model
panels.description: Source OTLP metric agentsfleet.credit.drained_nanos (sum, delta). rate() over the cumulative series the Collector emits. The money path stays in Postgres; this is observability only.

panels.title: Token Throughput — tokens/sec by direction
panels.description: Source OTLP metric agentsfleet.tokens.processed (sum, delta), split by direction {input, cached, output}.

panels.title: Run Latency p95 (ms)
panels.description: Source OTLP metric agentsfleet.run.duration_ms (histogram, delta). p95 from the cumulative _bucket series.

panels.title: Exporter Samples Dropped — per sec
panels.description: Source OTLP metric agentsfleet.telemetry.samples_dropped (sum, delta). Non-zero means the metrics exporter is shedding samples (ring full or distinct-series cap) — telemetry is lossy, NOT the money path.
